hero.sectionName: Kavya & Mihir – Royal Gujarati Palace Hero
hero.html:
❖
શ્રી ગણેશાય નમઃ
◆ A Royal Celebration ◆

આ શુભ લગ્ન પ્રસંગે આપનું હાર્દિક સ્વાગત છે

Kavya

&

Mihir

✦ ✦ ✦
Date Sunday, March 22 · 2026
|
Venue Akshar Grand Palace
|
Location Somerset, New Jersey

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate
a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat,
sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

RSVP & Celebrate With Us
જય શ્રી કૃષ્ણ
❖
Scroll to explore ↓
hero.designNotes: Deep burgundy-to-midnight brown gradient palace backdrop with a fine gold lattice pattern evokes the grandeur of a Gujarati royal haveli. A three-column layout flanks the central hero with animated spinning mandala medallions, flickering diya lamps, and vertical Gujarati script — conveying cultural richness without religious iconography overload. The centre is anchored by oversized Cormorant Garamond name typography with a liquid gold gradient treatment, a Rozha One ampersand glowing with a pulsing aura, and a Cormorant italic invitation message. A marigold toran string of animated CSS flowers bridges the CTA and message sections. Six floating marigold/orange petal elements drift gently on both sides. Staggered fade-up animations sequence the content reveal. Fully responsive: at 900px the side columns compress, at 640px they collapse entirely so the centre content dominates on mobile. All CSS scoped exclusively to .hero_001.
